title: Website Auth
description: Adds auth to an existing website.

examples.description: Add Cognito auth to an existing website

project.description: The root directory of the website.
project.x-prompt: the root directory for your website.

cognitoDomain.description: The cognito domain prefix to use. If omitted, a value is derived from the npm scope and website project name.
cognitoDomain.x-prompt: the cognito domain prefix to use i.e: https://{{cognitoDomain}}-123456789.auth.ap-southeast-2.amazoncognito.com (leave blank to derive from scope and project name)

iacProvider.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iacProvider.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: Inherit)
